Stand-alone PBT margin reached 5.9%, ahead of the annual guidance of 5.5%. For FY27, management expects a 75 to 100 basis point expansion in consol PBT margins.

order_book.note: The total order book reached an all-time high of INR 65,457 crores at the end of FY26. Order inflows for FY26 were closer to INR 13,000 crores, and management expects full year order wins to exceed INR 30,000 crores in FY27, indicating growth.
